CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR(255), s2 VARCHAR(255), insdel INT, rep INT, trans INT);
SELECT levenshtein(s1, s2, insdel, rep, trans) FROM test_strings;
SELECT s1, s2, levenshtein(s1, s2, insdel, rep, trans) AS distance FROM (SELECT * FROM test_strings) AS t;
SELECT s1, s2, (SELECT levenshtein(s1, s2, insdel, rep, trans) FROM test_strings WHERE insdel = 3) AS a_distance FROM test_strings WHERE rep = 2;
SELECT levenshtein(t1.s1, t2.s2, t1.insdel, t2.rep, t1.trans) FROM test_strings AS t1 JOIN test_strings AS t2 ON t1.s1 != t2.s1 WHERE t1.insdel < t2.insdel;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT s1, s2, levenshtein(s1, s2, insdel, rep, trans) AS distance FROM test_strings;
